reasoning: Query asks for cherry-blossom spots in Tohoku (excluding Tokyo). Tool only queried Akita and returned mostly museums/shrines/kofun with no sakura tag. Data is real but doesn't surface Kakunodate or Hirosaki. q_relevance is null throughout.
missing_data: No sakura/cherry-blossom tagging or seasonal attribute; Kakunodate not prominent; Aomori/Iwate/Miyagi not queried for Tohoku coverage.
improvement_hint: Add seasonal/keyword relevance scoring (sakura, hanami) and surface canonical hanami spots. Allow region (Tohoku) queries spanning multiple prefectures.

reasoning: Query asks for major sake breweries in Niigata. get_local_specialty returned only MAFF GI-designated foods (chamame, carrots, lotus root) — no breweries. Niigata sake is GI but not in this slice. Tool mismatch for breweries.
missing_data: Sake breweries (Hakkaisan, Kubota, Hakurakusei etc.) absent; GI 'Niigata sake' designation not surfaced.
improvement_hint: Either add a get_breweries tool or ensure GI:'Niigata 清酒' is exposed under category=beverage; route brewery queries to a brewery dataset.

reasoning: Hakuba ski + onsen query. Returned 6 spots: art museum, botanical garden, generic municipal pages (観光課, 観光商工係). No ski resorts, no onsen. Coordinates show many records share the village hall location.
missing_data: Ski resorts (Hakuba Happo-One, Goryu, Iwatake), onsen facilities (Hakuba Happo Onsen, Mimizuku-no-Yu).
improvement_hint: Surface ski-area and onsen tags from OSM/Wikidata; deprioritize organizational stub pages from municipal_scrape.

reasoning: Kansai autumn-foliage query. Kyoto-only call returned kofun, defense centers, obscure museums — no koyo spots like Tofuku-ji, Eikan-do, Arashiyama. q_relevance null. Fall foliage signal absent.
missing_data: Iconic koyo temples/gardens (Tofuku-ji, Eikan-do, Kiyomizu-dera, Arashiyama), region-wide query (Osaka/Nara/Hyogo).
improvement_hint: Add seasonal-keyword relevance (紅葉/koyo) and boost famous landmarks; support multi-prefecture region queries.

reasoning: Arabic query for Kansai sakura spots. Nara prefecture returned kofun and museums, no Yoshinoyama or Mt Yoshino, no sakura signal. Same pattern as L2-06/L2-09.
missing_data: Yoshinoyama (one of Japan's most famous sakura sites), Nara Park sakura, broader Kansai coverage.
improvement_hint: Implement seasonal/keyword boost; ensure famous heritage sites (Yoshino) rank above local museums.

reasoning: Stargazing on Okinawa remote islands. Returned Naha-area castles, museums, archaeological sites — none of the Yaeyama islands (Iriomote, Ishigaki, Hateruma) which host Japan's first dark-sky park.
missing_data: Iriomote-Ishigaki National Park (dark sky), Hateruma island, observatory facilities.
improvement_hint: Tag dark-sky/national-park designations; allow island-cluster filtering (離島).

reasoning: Thai query for rural Hokkaido onsen ryokan. Returned mostly Sapporo/Kushiro urban hotels and Niseko apartments. Only one onsen_ryokan (Kushimoto, wrong region). lodging_type filter not applied.
missing_data: Rural onsen ryokan (Noboribetsu, Sounkyo, Tokachigawa, Niseko traditional ryokan).
improvement_hint: Add lodging_type='onsen_ryokan' filter and rural/non-city constraint; surface famous onsen districts.

reasoning: Vietnamese query for Seto Inland Sea islands worth visiting. Kagawa-only and dominated by local museums; Naoshima/Teshima (the famous art islands) not surfaced prominently.
missing_data: Naoshima, Teshima, Shodoshima art islands; Hiroshima/Okayama-side islands.
improvement_hint: Tag islands explicitly; multi-prefecture Setouchi region query; boost famous islands.

reasoning: Query asks for indigo dyeing workshops in Tokushima. Returned 3 METI crafts including Awa Hon-ai Shijira (indigo woven) and Awa Washi (indigo-dyed paper) — relevant designations. But no actual workshop venues/addresses, only craft designations.
missing_data: Specific indigo workshops (e.g., 藍住町歴史館, Buaisou, AIZUMI workshops), addresses, hours.
improvement_hint: Link MAFF/METI craft designations to physical workshop spots; cross-reference with municipal_scrape on 藍染.

reasoning: German query for Mt Koya shukubo. Wakayama hotels returned Tanabe/Wakayama-city hotels, Kushimoto onsen — no Koyasan shukubo (Eko-in, Fukuchi-in, Henjokoin). lodging_type='temple' or 'shukubo' not applied.
missing_data: Koyasan shukubo (Eko-in, Fukuchi-in, Rengejo-in etc.), municipality=高野町 filter.
improvement_hint: Tag shukubo lodging_type; expose municipality filter to caller; classify temples in OSM.

reasoning: search_area for 武家屋敷 returned 92 matches incl. Aizu Bukeyashiki (Fukushima), Old Uchiyama (Fukui), Nagamachi (Kanazawa) — good. But noisy multi-language tourism portals (CN/TW) dominate top results.
missing_data: Kakunodate samurai district (Akita) — most famous outside Kyoto, not in top results shown.
improvement_hint: Deprioritize broad CMS landing pages; promote Wikidata-confirmed samurai-district entities. Add language filter.

reasoning: Indonesian query for Akita summer festivals. Returned 3 prefecture-level festivals (Dainichido Bugaku, Kakunodate, Tsuchizaki) plus national heritage list. Missing Kanto Matsuri (Akita's flagship summer festival). Translation good.
missing_data: Kanto Matsuri (秋田竿燈まつり) — Akita's most famous summer festival.
improvement_hint: Expand festival corpus beyond UNESCO/重要無形 to include 三大祭 and major regional summer matsuri.

reasoning: Korean query for small fishing villages in San'in. Shimane returned castle and inland local museums — no fishing-village content (Mihonoseki, Hamada port towns).
missing_data: Coastal fishing villages, port towns, Tottori coverage.
improvement_hint: Tag coastal/port-town spots; multi-prefecture San'in region query.

reasoning: Where to experience washi in Gifu. Returned 9 craft designations incl. Mino Ware, Hidehira-nuri, Hida Shunkei. Mino Washi (Japan's most famous washi from Gifu) likely in fuller list but not shown in first window. No workshop addresses.
missing_data: Mino-washi specifically (本美濃紙 UNESCO), Mino City Washi Museum, hands-on workshop venues.

reasoning: Spanish query for Noto fishing villages. Ishikawa returned Kanazawa museums and one Wajima lacquerware museum — no Noto fishing villages (Wajima morning market area, Sosogi, Suzu coast).
missing_data: Wajima asaichi, Shiroyone Senmaida, Sosogi, Suzu fishing communities.
improvement_hint: Tag coastal/fishing spots; municipality filter for Noto towns (輪島市, 珠洲市).

reasoning: search_area for 砂丘 returned 84 matches but top dominated by Tottori (which user explicitly excluded), GI ranchкyo, and unrelated Saga/Yamagata multi-language portals. Other dunes (Nakatajima, Sarugamori) buried/missing.
missing_data: Nakatajima (Shizuoka), Sarugamori (Aomori), Niigata sand dunes.
improvement_hint: Honor exclusion intent; deprioritize already-named entity (Tottori) when query says 'beyond X'.

reasoning: Chinese query for San'in traditional crafts. Returned 4 METI craft designations for Shimane (Iwami-yaki, Sekishu washi, etc.) with full Chinese translations. Solid coverage of designated crafts in target region.
missing_data: Tottori-side crafts not included (San'in spans 2 prefectures).
improvement_hint: Allow region-level query (San'in = Shimane+Tottori) to combine prefecture results.

reasoning: Lavender beyond Furano in Hokkaido. Returned shell mounds, archaeological sites, Ainu Museum, Kamifurano Folk Museum. Only Kamifurano is on-topic; no Tomita Farm, Choei lavender park, Saroma — actual lavender fields buried.
missing_data: Farm Tomita (Nakafurano, although Furano-area), Hinode Park (Kamifurano), other lavender venues outside Furano.
improvement_hint: Tag flower-fields and seasonal crops; respect 'beyond X' exclusion.

reasoning: Tagalog query (mistranslated as 'coffee towns', actually 'traditional towns'). Oita returned shrines, kofun museums, Yabakei museum — no historic preservation districts (Kitsuki samurai town, Hita Mameda-machi).
missing_data: Kitsuki castle town, Hita Mameda-machi 重要伝統的建造物群保存地区, Usuki old town.
improvement_hint: Tag 重伝建 (preservation districts); region-level Kyushu query.

reasoning: Japanese query for kominka stays in Hokuriku. Ishikawa hotels returned student housing, AB Hotel, ANA Crowne Plaza, Kanaya guesthouse — no kominka filter applied. Type/lodging metadata insufficient to surface kominka.
missing_data: Kominka stays (e.g., 集落丸山, NIPPONIA, Wajima/Suzu kominka inns).

reasoning: Mountain shrines in Kii Peninsula. get_japan_heritage Wakayama returned 7 stories incl. whaling culture (off-topic for mountain shrines). Likely Kumano sanzan, Koyasan stories present in full count=7 but truncation only shows whaling. Partially relevant.
missing_data: Direct shrine entities (Kumano Hongu/Hayatama/Nachi Taisha, Koyasan); Mie/Nara coverage for full Kii peninsula.

reasoning: Sea of Japan summer fireworks. count=0 for Niigata festivals. Falls back to UNESCO list (Akita, Iwate, Saitama, Toyama, Mie, Aichi) — irrelevant geographically and not fireworks. Nagaoka Hanabi (one of Japan's biggest) absent.
missing_data: Nagaoka Hanabi, Kashiwazaki Marine Fireworks, Niigata Matsuri Hanabi.
wrong_data: Fallback to unrelated UNESCO entries from non-target prefectures could mislead agent.
improvement_hint: Add fireworks (花火大会) corpus; suppress unrelated national fallback when prefecture has zero matches.

reasoning: Oita bamboo crafts. Returned Beppu Bamboo Crafts (METI 0630) with full description, production area, designation date — directly answers query. Also Hakata Ori (cross-listed). Solid official designation data.
missing_data: Workshop venues / hands-on classes for tourists (e.g., Beppu Traditional Bamboo Crafts Center).

reasoning: Cycling routes in rural Shikoku. Ehime returned kofun, castle museums, temples — no Shimanami Kaido (world-famous cycling route from Imabari). Cycling-specific signal absent.
missing_data: Shimanami Kaido, Tobishima Kaido cycling routes, rental hubs.

reasoning: Kabuki outside Tokyo/Kyoto. get_traditional_arts returned 183 items but top results are Nogaku, Kibune Matsuri, Okuma Kabuto — generic intangible cultural properties. Local kabuki venues (Kanamaru-za in Kotohira, Uchiko-za, jikabuki) not surfaced near top.
